pr_title: fix: adaptive retry loop, haiku max_tokens, relax review_lever
pr_description: Adaptive retry loop**: Replace fixed 3-call loop with min-15-levers / max-5-calls strategy. Stops early when enough levers are accumulated; tolerates mid-loop failures without discarding prior results. Haiku max_tokens**: Reduce from 16000 to 8192 to match haiku's actual API output cap, preventing JSON truncation. review_lever relaxed**: Lower hard limit from 50 to 10 chars. The enrich step adds detail downstream, so 50 is a soft target only. Fixes llama3.1 batch rejections on short but valid reviews. Remove lever_classification**: Reverted — the required field regressed success rate from 97.1% to 88.6% (iter 33 assessment).
